payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark-painted rectangular fireplace opening with a stepped mantel profile, a matte finish surround, a deep black interior, and a rounded gray hearth stone visible at the base; left edge shows a partial carved wooden trim and the crop is edge-cut, photographed from about 1.2 m away.
